title: dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. linearifolius
intro: Dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. linearifolius, also known as Linear-leaved dontostemon, is a subspecies of perennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, native to China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Dontostemon pinnatifidus subsp. linearifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
